ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: HTTPS or SSH URL of the remote Git repository for your vault.
ast.target: 用于您保险库的远程 Git 仓库的 HTTPS 或 SSH URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: jj bookmark to push to on the remote.
ast.target: 要推送到远程的 jj 书签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the jj executable. Leave as "jj" if it is on your PATH. Common locations: /opt/homebrew/bin/jj, /usr/local/bin/jj.
ast.target: jj 可执行文件的路径。如果它在您的 PATH 中，请保留为 \"jj\"。常见位置：/opt/homebrew/bin/jj, /usr/local/bin/jj。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check whether the vault is behind the remote when Obsidian starts.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 启动时检查保险库是否落后于远程。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically sync with the remote on startup if the vault is behind.
ast.target: 如果保险库落后，则在启动时自动与远程同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sync automatically at this interval. Set to 0 to disable. Restart Obsidian to apply changes.
ast.target: 按此间隔自动同步。设置为 0 可禁用。重启 Obsidian 以应用更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control which jj sync notices appear in the Obsidian UI.
ast.target: 控制哪些 jj 同步通知会出现在 Obsidian 界面中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Suppress the confirmation notice shown after a successful sync.
ast.target: 抑制成功同步后显示的确认通知。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Authentication failed. Check your SSH keys, credentials, or remote URL in jj Sync settings.
ast.target: 认证失败。请检查您的 SSH 密钥、凭据或 jj 同步设置中的远程 URL。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Network error. Check your internet connection and remote URL.
ast.target: 网络错误。请检查您的互联网连接和远程 URL。

ast.name: message
ast.source: jj binary not found or not executable. Check the jj binary path in jj Sync settings.
ast.target: 未找到 jj 二进制文件或其不可执行。请检查 jj 同步设置中的 jj 二进制文件路径。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Vault is not a jj repository. Initialize it from jj Sync settings or run "jj git init".
ast.target: 保险库不是 jj 仓库。请从 jj 同步设置中初始化它或运行 \"jj git init\"。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Push rejected. The remote has diverged. Try syncing again to fetch and rebase first.
ast.target: 推送被拒绝。远程已分叉。请尝试再次同步以先获取并变基。
